full_text:
Zhongli Sheng 鍾離盛
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhongli Sheng (鍾離盛)was born in Shanyin county, Kuaiji commandery. Just like his father, he was respectful and deferential. Zhongli Sheng was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
